requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Baseline Versus Kazakhstan Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基线与哈萨克斯坦证据
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基線與哈薩克斯坦證據

summary.en: Kazakhstan stakeholders may accept Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 reports as useful background evidence for lithium-ion cells and batteries, but they generally need to be mapped to the Kazakhstan market-access package: EAC/TR CU files, ST RK / GOST / IEC standards specified in the contract, grid-connection requirements, fire-safety review, transport evidence, and local-language technical documentation.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦相关方可能将中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023报告作为锂离子电芯和电池的有用背景证据，但通常需要映射至哈萨克斯坦市场准入资料包：EAC/TR CU文件、合同指定的ST RK / GOST / IEC标准、并网要求、消防安全审查、运输证据和当地语言技术文件。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦相關方可能將中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023報告作為鋰離子電芯和電池的有用背景證據，但通常需要映射至哈薩克斯坦市場准入資料包：EAC/TR CU文件、合同指定的ST RK / GOST / IEC標準、併網要求、消防安全審查、運輸證據和當地語言技術文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 or applicable ST RK / GOST adoption
Kazakhstan grid, fire, transport, and customs requirements

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 is China's compulsory safety standard for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, while GB/T 36276-2023 is commonly used for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage. Together with PCS and system reports, they form the typical China-side technical baseline for a BESS export package.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024是中国电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池强制性安全标准，GB/T 36276-2023通常用于电力储能用锂离子电池。连同PCS和系统报告，这些文件构成BESS出口资料包中常见的中国侧技术基线。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024是中國電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池強制性安全標準，GB/T 36276-2023通常用於電力儲能用鋰離子電池。連同PCS和系統報告，這些文件構成BESS出口資料包中常見的中國側技術基線。

gap.en: The practical gap is traceability and equivalence. Exporters should prepare a document matrix showing which Chinese test report, drawing, BMS function, PCS setting, safety analysis, and factory certificate satisfies each Kazakhstan EAC, IEC/ST RK/GOST, grid, fire, and transport item, then identify missing retests, translations, local applicant documents, markings, and commissioning records.
gap.zh: 实际差距在可追溯性和等同性。出口商应准备文件矩阵，说明每份中国测试报告、图纸、BMS功能、PCS参数、安全分析和工厂证书分别满足哈萨克斯坦EAC、IEC/ST RK/GOST、并网、消防和运输的哪些项目，并识别缺失的补测、翻译、当地申请人文件、标识和调试记录。
gap.zht: 實際差距在可追溯性和等同性。出口商應準備文件矩陣，說明每份中國測試報告、圖紙、BMS功能、PCS參數、安全分析和工廠證書分別滿足哈薩克斯坦EAC、IEC/ST RK/GOST、併網、消防和運輸的哪些項目，並識別缺失的補測、翻譯、當地申請人文件、標識和調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Informational mapping requirement; underlying EAC, grid, fire, transport, and project requirements may be mandatory depending on scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024 where in scope; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation Standard Information Public Service Platform

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are a China baseline, not a Kazakhstan clearance package. They should be mapped to EAC, ST RK / GOST / IEC, KEGOC, fire, and UN 38.3 deliverables.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是中国基线，不是哈萨克斯坦通关或准入资料包。应将其映射至EAC、ST RK / GOST / IEC、KEGOC、消防和UN 38.3交付项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是中國基線，不是哈薩克斯坦通關或准入資料包。應將其映射至EAC、ST RK / GOST / IEC、KEGOC、消防和UN 38.3交付項。
